title: AuroraBound
description: AuroraBound is a visually-enhanced adventure-survival modpack that expands Minecraft with new biomes, dungeons, mobs, and ambient beauty — all while keeping the vanilla spirit alive.
body:
🌌 AuroraBound
Version: 1.20.1 | Loader: Fabric

"AuroraBound" is a visually-enhanced, adventure-survival Minecraft modpack that reimagines the vanilla experience with breathtaking biomes, immersive environments, new structures, and mysterious creatures — all while staying true to the heart of Minecraft.

🌿 Explore lush biomes from Terralith and Regions Unexplored.
🧱 Discover ancient ruins and dungeons scattered across the land.
🧌 Battle unique mobs and uncover magical relics.
🎨 Enjoy shader support, ambient sounds, seasons, and realistic skies.
🗺️ Survive and thrive with better tools, food systems, and gear.

**Built for explorers, builders, and survivalists who want more depth and atmosphere — without straying too far from the vanilla spirit.**

Mid-End-Laptop/PC Needed ( HeavyModpack )
